channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI built my first 5 apps: what actually shipped
item.description: Cut time-to-first-deploy from days to 12 minutes with AI scaffolding — the real tools non-traditional developers used to ship products in 2026

item.title: Salary boosts from AI infra in 2026
item.description: 2026 AI salary data: prompt-tuning vs vector-search infra — the skills that actually move the paycheck with concrete benchmarks and cost numbers.

item.title: Track 7 silent LLM pipeline failures
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline latency 60% with 7 metrics most teams miss — prompt cache hit ratio, token budget, embedding cache, generation latency, hallucination rate, model drift, upstream RTT.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the 40ms lie in tutorials
item.description: Cut RAG latency 96% without adding servers — batch retrieval, query rewriting, and chunk-ID caching in production. 3.2M queries served at p95 42ms on $240/month Kubernetes.

item.title: Killed by good intentions: over-engineering costs
item.description: Cut API latency 76% and cost 80% by replacing microservices with a tamed monolith — the real cost of over-engineering in 2026.

item.title: Pick the right real-time protocol in 2026
item.description: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long polling in 2026 with real latency, cost, and memory data from Node 20, Python 3.12, and Redis 7.2 benchmarks.

item.title: Set maxPoolSize=10? Wrong default
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by resizing connection pools — Aurora PostgreSQL 3.04.2 case study with concrete numbers for pool size, cost, and latency

item.title: Local LLM: it’s slower than you think
item.description: Cut local LLM latency 60% with the right model and tooling — context limits, 4-bit quantization, and why most benchmarks lie

item.title: Measure vector search before buying a DB
item.description: Cut vector DB costs 60% with pgvector vs Milvus — latency benchmarks, cache hit tactics, and the exact metric to check before you buy.

item.title: Slash cloud carbon 35% yet keep speed
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 35% in 2026 without adding latency — concrete numbers, async Python 3.12, SQS FIFO batching, and the idle-CPU mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Debug Node.js memory leaks in under an hour
item.description: Stop Node.js memory leaks in 20 min — 70% are unbounded caches or closures. Heap snapshots, LRU cache fixes, and production monitoring tactics that cut memory growth 85% in one cycle.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the latency trap you didn’t see coming
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 75% and costs 47% by normalizing queries, caching embeddings, and switching to Qdrant gRPC — the hidden costs tutorials never mention.

item.title: Laptops can’t run LLMs—here’s why
item.description: Run a 7B LLM locally in under 2 seconds on a laptop — hardware picks, version pins, and the swap trap most guides ignore.

item.title: Freelance devs: 3 silent burnout killers
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 42% by capping clients, standardizing stacks, and wiping local dev every 30 days — real metrics, real tools, real recovery

item.title: Senior exodus: what speed kills at big tech
item.description: Measure PR to prod latency in 30 mins — 5 real teams, 1,847 deployments, and the exact scripts to spot velocity decay before seniors quit.

item.title: Salary to global rate in 18 months
item.description: Earned 2.34× jump in take-home pay by reframing open-source impact as measurable results—cut memory 38%, saved 2,300 dev-hours/month, landed 10,500 USD remote role

item.title: 2026 AI Skills That Pay the Most
item.description: Cut AI skill acquisition time 50% with NLP — job demand, salary range, and growth potential

item.title: Rewrite REST for 5G: latency cuts in 20 lines
item.description: Cut API response time 55% on 5G with 20 lines of code — connection-aware retries, mobile tagging, and the tower handoff mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Queue now or pay later
item.description: easured a 22% throughput drop when we switc with Queue now pay later — this when a team I joined decided Redis Streams wou.

item.title: Designing AI systems that actually work
item.description: Cut AI response time 78% and token cost 72% with prompt sharding, embedding caching, and circuit breakers — the boring patterns that survive week 1 and beyond.
